prompt: You are executing /implement-plan for plan_file=.agents/scratchpad/feature-api/plan.md. Assume all checklists pass. In the Core phase, tasks.md lists T007 (write API endpoint tests in tests/api_test.py) and T008 (implement API endpoint in src/api/routes.py). Both are sequential tasks in the Core phase. Show the execution plan for this phase, specifically explaining the ordering of these two tasks.

assertions.text: Executes or plans to execute test task T007 before implementation task T008
References TDD-first or test-first approach as the reason for this ordering
Does not execute T008 before its corresponding test task T007 completes
